title: NIAB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Research Fellow Posts
description: BRIC-National Institute of Animal Biotechnology (NIAB) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Senior Research Fellow Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the M.E/ M.Tech, M.V.Sc, and M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the NIAB Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
